generated_exposure.exposure_text: Strategic autonomy sounds great in theory, but have you seen what happens when we actually try to implement it? Our allies are cutting deals with foreign tech firms while our own industries struggle. Meanwhile, critical infrastructure projects get delayed because we can't agree on standards. We're becoming a national security liability. Time to face facts: real security comes from strong alliances, not wishful thinking about self-sufficiency. #NationalSecurityFirst
